name: Ladies' Lunch World [VORE RPG]
description:
[CW: Vore, Digestion (Optional Endo), Optional unbirth and breast, and anal vore, Female pred, Male prey, Scat disposal, Free-use]

A world mostly occupied by many unsuspecting and delicious guys that are constantly being gobbled up by the smaller female population without any consequences. In this you can either play as one of the few women in the world, able to make any man their meal. Or play as a man, living with the constant threat of ending up in a tight gut. Have fun!

Update: Now the bot allows for preyPOV!

Like the last bot, there's no reformation, so be careful who you digest!

This is the female counterpart to another bot I've made, both are which are based on bots made by @Jayden5678 and @Naomi7. Their bots, as well as the male version of this bot are linked here if you're interested:

[Naomi's bot]

[Jayden's bot]

Pfp art made by Cactaur98 on Eka's!

Second bot on here, requested by @Schmeatbeater2000! Even though requests are something I don't really do, lol. After this, I'll branch out and do some other kinds of bots. But don't worry, I'll make something vore-related every now and then, cuz nothing will ever stop me from being vorny >:D
